summary: Testing iteration 22 - Update mode for Context-Aware ROOK AI and Sidebar Tab Grouping. All sidebar grouping features verified (World/Tools/Players groups, ungrouped tabs, Battle Maps rename, collapsible groups). Backend context APIs tested. Found 2 bugs: 1) RQKLogoInline undefined error in PlayerDashboard, 2) Campaign setting save not persisting after reload.

ui_bugs.issue: RQKLogoInline is not defined - ReferenceError when loading PlayerDashboard. The component references RQKLogoInline which doesn't exist.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Import or define RQKLogoInline component in PlayerDashboard.js or replace with RQKLogo

ui_bugs.issue: Campaign setting content not persisting after page reload. Save appears successful but old content restored on reload.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Check that save API actually persists to database and frontend refetches on load

MEDIUM: Investigate campaign setting save not persisting - check backend save endpoint and frontend fetch logic

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar grouping fully tested and working. ROOK AI context-aware generation backend verified. Two bugs found: RQKLogoInline undefined in PlayerDashboard (HIGH priority), campaign setting save not persisting (MEDIUM priority). Golden path test for player flow blocked by PlayerDashboard error.

sidebar_tab_grouping.description: World group (Setting, World Builder, Gods, Locations, NPCs), Tools group (Reference, Encounter Gen, Items), Players group (Party), ungrouped tabs (Combat, Battle Maps, Calendar, Notes)

battle_maps_rename.description: Maps tab renamed to Battle Maps - verified in sidebar and content loads correctly

collapsible_groups.description: Groups expand/collapse on click, active tab's group auto-expands

rook_context_backend.description: get_campaign_context() pulls setting, NPCs, locations, gods, notes from campaign

rook_api_endpoints.description: /api/rook/generate and /api/unseen-servant/generate both work, invalid entity types return 400

player_dashboard.description: RQKLogoInline is not defined - blocks PlayerDashboard from loading

bugs_found.description: RQKLogoInline is not defined - ReferenceError crashes the PlayerDashboard component
bugs_found.reproduction: Login as player with character linked to campaign, navigate to player dashboard
bugs_found.stacktrace: ReferenceError: RQKLogoInline is not defined at PlayerDashboard (bundle.js:47901:97)

bugs_found.description: Campaign setting content doesn't persist after page reload
bugs_found.reproduction: Go to Campaign Dashboard > Setting tab, enter content, click Save, reload page - old content shown
